meta.purpose: Maschinenlesbares Register fuer verbindliche WellFit-Agenten-Workflows und Stufe-4-Autonomiegrenzen.

workflows.name: WellFit Stufe 4 Autonomous Development Workflow
workflows.summary: Ziel verstehen -> Konzept pruefen -> Struktur ableiten -> Seiten erfassen -> Aufgaben erstellen -> Code bauen -> automatisch testen -> Fehler beheben -> Dokumentation aktualisieren -> Preview liefern -> Nutzerfeedback auswerten -> weiter optimieren.

controlRegisters.purpose: Task selection, risk classification, stop rules, and definition-of-done controls for future autonomous agents.
controlRegisters.usage: Before choosing or implementing a task, classify risk, select a task candidate, select a definitionOfDoneKey, and honor stop conditions.

controlRegisters.purpose: Module readiness, risk, blockers, safe next task, duplicate-warning, advancement checks, and human-approval guidance for future agents.
controlRegisters.usage: Before selecting module work, verify readiness status and required checks; stop or request human review for blocked, review-required, critical, or protected modules.

controlRegisters.purpose: Repeatable loop for safe task selection, work recording, TODO status validation, and follow-up handoff for future agents.
controlRegisters.usage: Start by running the next-task picker, record completed PR outcomes with the recorder, run the follow-up detector in report-only mode, validate TODO status markers, and create follow-ups only in existing leading files.

controlRegisters.purpose: Detect route/API/register drift and concept-to-code mapping gaps before agents create duplicate routes, APIs, architecture, or product systems.
controlRegisters.usage: Run both scripts before adding routes, APIs, feature mappings, readiness changes, or concept-driven implementation work; resolve only safe registry gaps and leave high/critical areas for human review.

controlRegisters.purpose: Optional route-register-backed visual screenshot smoke validation for public, mobile beta-preview, and protected app routes without changing product logic or making browser checks mandatory.
controlRegisters.usage: Run after perceptible UI changes and through quality gate report-only mode; if browser support or preview URL is unavailable, record the safe skip instead of failing the main build.

controlRegisters.purpose: Internal-first, optional-external-research governance for unclear WellFit product or technical questions; requires three options, one recommendation, risk classification, and human review before implementation.
controlRegisters.usage: Read internal sources first, report when external research is unavailable, present at least three options, select exactly one recommendation, classify risk, and never implement high/critical or protected-topic decisions without explicit human approval.

controlRegisters.purpose: Planning-only governance for future aggregate Adaptive User Insight summaries without raw user data, live tracking, runtime personalization, or protected product logic changes.
controlRegisters.usage: Use only aggregate cohorts above minimum thresholds, keep activationState=planning_only, expose no raw identifiers or sensitive fields to agents, and require human review for high/critical or protected-topic recommendations.

controlRegisters.purpose: Single dry-run-only entrypoint that reads existing governance, selects the next safe task, classifies risk, reports checks/files/stop conditions, and stops before implementation, merge, or deploy.
controlRegisters.usage: Run after reading required memory files and before implementation planning. Treat output as report-only; stop on high/critical/unclear risk or protected areas.

controlRegisters.purpose: Machine-readable and human-readable framework that tells future agents which registers, TODO files, Work Map entries, readiness files, validation scripts, and docs to inspect/update whenever routes, APIs, modules, agent scripts, roadmap items, feedback/insight systems, visual checks, Unity/AR plans, compliance areas, or governance files change.
controlRegisters.usage: After every agent task, identify matching change categories, inspect required files, update relevant required targets, preserve historical context, run the cross-reference maintenance check, and report protected/runtime areas touched or explicitly untouched.

controlRegisters.purpose: Full repository inventory and coverage audit for mapped, protected, unmapped, stale, duplicate, route, and API coverage without changing runtime product code.
controlRegisters.usage: Before broad repository work, inspect repository-inventory.json and run the repository inventory check; triage warnings through existing Work Map, Product Readiness, route/API, TODO, or project-register sources rather than creating parallel architecture.

controlRegisters.purpose: Report-only auto-merge eligibility policy and validator for future PR safety assessment without enabling or performing merges.
controlRegisters.usage: Run as part of the quality gate or before PR handoff to print AUTO_MERGE_ELIGIBLE=true/false with reasons. Treat every output as report-only; do not merge, approve, deploy, or enable auto-merge without human approval.

controlRegisters.purpose: Report-only policy and decision check for whether future failed validation checks look safely auto-repairable without enabling real repairs.
controlRegisters.usage: Use only after a failed check or quality-gate report exists; classify against safe categories, forbidden paths/topics, max attempts, and stop conditions, then stop for human review unless all report-only evidence is safe.

controlRegisters.purpose: Report-only PR review governance for changed-file review, risk and definition-of-done evidence, protected-area checks, cross-reference maintenance, Product Readiness, repository inventory, auto-merge eligibility, auto-repair decision, and no-duplicate-architecture confirmation.
controlRegisters.usage: Run during quality gate and PR handoff. Treat output as non-authorizing: it never approves, merges, repairs, deploys, or bypasses human review.

controlRegisters.purpose: Report-only Batch Autopilot policy and validator for planning multiple safe low-risk WellFit agent tasks without executing, writing, repairing, merging, creating PRs, approving, or deploying.
controlRegisters.usage: Use after the single-task Autopilot controls when a future agent needs a sequenced plan. Treat output as dry-run planning only and stop before implementation or protected work.

controlRegisters.purpose: Report/check-only safety boundary for future strictly limited batch execution of low-risk documentation, register, governance, and inventory tasks.
controlRegisters.usage: Run the checker before any future batch execution discussion; keep first version non-executing, non-PR-creating, non-merging, non-repairing, non-deploying, and human-approval-gated.

controlRegisters.purpose: Framework-only Batch Execution Runner governance that connects approved low-risk task selection, allowed-file checks, task-status/work-log evidence, cross-reference maintenance, PR handoff, PR Diff Review Report, and PR Post-Creation Guard without enabling real execution, PR creation, auto-merge, auto-repair, self-approval, deployment, or protected-area changes.
controlRegisters.usage: Run in report/check-only mode through the quality gate or before any future runner activation discussion. Treat BATCH_EXECUTION_RUNNER_READY as evidence only; no autonomous execution is enabled until a separate human-approved one-task activation PR.

controlRegisters.purpose: Report-only task status and work-log sync governance for TODO markers, task lifecycle, completed-task evidence, blocked/stale/duplicate handling, PR/check/changed-file/follow-up/next-task recording, and Batch Autopilot memory consistency.
controlRegisters.usage: Run during quality gate and before longer Autopilot/Batch sessions. Treat output as report-only; do not rewrite TODO files automatically, merge, repair, deploy, or touch runtime/protected areas.

controlRegisters.purpose: Report-only post-PR guard requiring future agents to inspect newly created PR mergeability, required checks, protected paths, auto-merge/auto-repair/PR-review results, task evidence, and next action before stopping.
controlRegisters.usage: Run after PR creation and in the quality gate. If a PR is not mergeable or checks are not green, classify the failure; only docs/register safe repair guidance may be considered when explicitly allowed, otherwise use replacement-PR guidance or stop for human review.

controlRegisters.purpose: Report-only changed-file/PR-diff inspection that classifies files, detects protected paths/topics, reports cross-reference/readiness/inventory/task-status impact, and summarizes PR guard signals before merge consideration.
controlRegisters.usage: Run before PR handoff or through the quality gate. Treat output as evidence only; it never approves, merges, repairs, deploys, closes PRs, or authorizes protected/runtime work.

controlRegisters.purpose: Report-only website agent/readiness/backlog governance for public website, desktop beta, and mobile/PWA route findings before runtime website changes.
controlRegisters.usage: Before website-readiness work, validate the framework and backlog, classify route group/status/protected topics, record findings with next safe tasks, avoid duplicate architecture, and keep sensitive topics review_required.

controlRegisters.purpose: Report-only memory for open points, dependency chains, review-required/blocked items, required next files, affected registers, and next-agent handoffs.
controlRegisters.usage: Read before closing governance/framework tasks; add entries for unresolved dependencies and required machine-readable outputs instead of creating parallel systems.

controlRegisters.purpose: Catalog existing WellFit agents/frameworks and record human-approved future agents/frameworks without building them automatically.
controlRegisters.usage: Before extending or proposing an agent, confirm existing owner domains, connected registers, approved future backlog status, protected boundaries, and report-only validator readiness.

controlRegisters.purpose: Report-only ethical engagement guard for healthy retention, age-appropriate design, recovery, consent, missions, rewards, Buddy tone, social features, sponsors, website claims, and monetization proposals.
controlRegisters.usage: Before planning engagement mechanics, validate against forbidden FOMO, shame, gambling/lootbox, sleep-deprivation, dark-pattern, age-inappropriate monetization, social humiliation, paywall pressure, protected-data-sensitive, and review_required boundaries.

controlRegisters.purpose: Owner-only Schutz fuer Beta-1-Canonical-Truth-Dateien erzwingen: lesen Pflicht, Aenderungen nur mit expliziter Owner-Freigabe, sonst block-and-handoff.
controlRegisters.usage: Vor Beta-1-Governance/Planning/Register-Aenderungen diese Dateien lesen, ohne Owner-Freigabe nicht bearbeiten und stattdessen Blocker + vorgeschlagenen Patch in nicht-geschuetzten Handoff/Register-Dateien dokumentieren.

additionalGovernanceInputs.purpose: Report-only healthy motivation and anti-addictive-design framework; no runtime personalization or protected data use.

workflows.antiDuplicationRule: If a feature, topic, API, route, or architecture area already exists in todolist/WORK_MAP.md or project-register files, continue there instead of creating a parallel implementation or duplicate architecture.

phases.purpose: Understand goal, scope, non-goals, safety boundaries, and expected result.
phases.requiredOutput: Goal and scope note with allowed and excluded work.
riskGates: Stop or document blocker if scope touches compliance, reward, payment, token, health, child, location, or privacy logic.

phases.purpose: Check existing concepts, Work Map, TODOs, and registers to avoid duplicate work.
forbiddenActions: create concepts beside existing leading files
phases.requiredOutput: Reference to leading file or documented reason for a new entry.
riskGates: Do not continue if an existing concept conflicts or a human decision is missing.

phases.purpose: Derive existing WellFit structure, module boundaries, and affected registers from the goal.
phases.requiredOutput: Structure decision with affected files/registers and excluded areas.
riskGates: Stop if work would touch Unity, PR #13, compliance-critical logic, or unapproved product areas.

phases.purpose: Capture affected pages, secondary pages, routes, APIs, and features before implementation.
allowedActions: plan crawl or audit for UI work
forbiddenActions: create routes or APIs without register entry
skip security review for API changes
phases.requiredOutput: Affected routes, APIs, and features in task plan and PR report.
riskGates: Economy/reward APIs must not activate final authority.

phases.purpose: Create small, reviewable tasks from structure and risks.
allowedActions: create new tasks only if no existing entry fits
phases.requiredOutput: Task plan with status, test plan, and documentation duties.
riskGates: No implementation without defined checks and explicit forbidden-area boundaries.

phases.purpose: If code work is in scope, implement the smallest suitable change inside existing architecture.
requiredInputFiles: relevant Next.js docs for Next.js API/routing/rendering/build changes
phases.requiredOutput: Minimal diff mapped to existing feature, route, or API.
riskGates: Stop if work would activate final reward/ledger authority, real purchases, secrets, or live integrations.

phases.purpose: Run lint, type, build, functions, and quality-gate checks.
phases.requiredOutput: Result list for npm run lint, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, npm --prefix functions run check, npm run agent:quality-gate, visual-route-smoke-check when visual/screenshot validation is relevant, and product-readiness-check where relevant., auto-merge eligibility report-only result
riskGates: PR may include failures only with transparent cause, risk, and next fix step.
Visual screenshot checks remain optional/report-only unless browser support and a safe preview URL are explicitly available.
Auto-merge eligibility checks are report-only and must never enable or perform a merge.

phases.purpose: Analyze found errors, fix them minimally, and repeat checks.
forbiddenActions: hide errors by removing important tests/rules
phases.requiredOutput: Fixed errors or documented blocker with cause, files, and next step.
riskGates: Document blocker instead of speculative fix when requirements conflict or decision is missing.

phases.purpose: Keep documentation and machine-readable registers aligned with the work.
forbiddenActions: create new agent/register/workflow family without agent-extension proposal and human review
phases.requiredOutput: Updated docs/registers or explicit note that no update is needed.
riskGates: Governance changes require human-readable and machine-readable sources to match.

phases.purpose: Deliver review-ready PR with preview/test notes.
phases.requiredOutput: Pull request with goal, changed files, checks, risks, preview notes, and next recommended task.
riskGates: Do not finish with commit but no PR, or PR but no commit.
No live release without human approval.

phases.purpose: Evaluate available user feedback after PR/preview and map it to existing tasks.
allowedActions: create new task only if no existing entry fits
forbiddenActions: treat feedback as automatic product approval
phases.requiredOutput: Feedback evaluation linked to existing tasks or justified new register entry.
riskGates: Compliance- or safety-relevant feedback requires human decision before implementation.

phases.purpose: Prepare the next small iteration without overloading the current PR.
allowedActions: sort follow-up work into existing registers
append agent work-log entries that record checks, follow-ups, and the next recommended task
forbiddenActions: continue feature work after closure without new assignment
phases.requiredOutput: Concrete next recommendation and clean handoff.
riskGates: Do not start another iteration when tests/build are red without documented blocker/plan.

agentExtensionPolicyReference.purpose: Decide existing-agent extension vs proposal-required new agent before adding agent/framework capability.

workflows.purpose: Validate Product Intelligence Agent report-only governance before runtime product intelligence work is considered.
Validate Mission Factory Agent report-only governance before runtime mission work is considered.
Validate Healthy Retention Agent report-only governance before runtime retention work is considered.
Validate Agent Control Center proposal, approval, risk, controlled-curiosity, Codex task draft, and admin concept governance without creating runtime UI or enabling merge/deploy.
